final:
module RefModule(
    input clk,
    input [3:0] stock,
    output reg hay          
    );always @(posedge clk) begin       
            case(stock)
                4'b0000: hay = 0;   
                default: hay = 1;   
            endcase
    end
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
    end
  end

endmodule
